title: Bug regression — Coffee with milk added via CONFIRMING_ORDER DET path captures option
notes: Bug: DET_ADD_CONFIRMING 'all-ready' path did not call _capture_options_from_message, so adding a cappuccino with oat milk while reviewing a cart would miss the oat milk special_instructions. Fixed by applying _capture_options_from_message in that path.

turns.message: Can I get a Classic Smash Burger
Add a cappuccino with oat milk
